_note: ROUND 3 (great-grandparents), batch d_800_1400_2: one generation back from 33 round-2 grandparents (medieval, 800-1400 AD). 33 of 34 batch ids given documented parents; SKIPPED 1: R2E_HUMBERT1SAVOY (Humbert I 'Whitehands', founder of the House of Savoy) — his parentage is legendary/undocumented (Wikipedia: 'the origins of this dynasty are unknown'; late-medieval legend names a Saxon 'Berold', unverifiable), so no parents created. Where both parents already existed in the tree, families merge onto the existing union (Fulk V+Ermengarde of Maine -> Sibylla of Anjou; Louis VII+Constance of Castile -> Alys of France; Henry the Lion+Matilda of England -> Henry V Palatine; Amadeus III of Savoy [SPG_AMADEUS3SAVOY]+Mahaut of Albon -> Matilda & Humbert III of Savoy; Alfonso VII [R2E_ALFONSO7_LEONCASTILE]+Richeza of Poland -> Sancha of Castile). Cross-links realized this batch: Gerard, Duke of Lorraine + Hedwige of Namur are parents of BOTH batch member Beatrice of Lorraine and (as a sibling node) Theodoric II of Lorraine, father of batch member Thierry of Alsace; Geza II of Hungary + Euphrosyne of Kiev are parents of BOTH batch member Bela III and Elizabeth of Hungary (R3C_ELIZABETH_HUNGARY), who is the mother of batch member Ludmilla of Bohemia. New nodes use the R3C_ prefix. Sourced to Wikipedia except Hugues du Perche's parents (Henry Project/Geni reconstruction, moderate confidence) and Beatrice of Faucigny's father (genealogical sources, moderate confidence). Two mothers not recorded (Amaury de Montfort's, Beatrice of Faucigny's) use clearly-labeled placeholder nodes with no invented name. Verified 2026-07-17.

a.label:

families.note: Hugues du Perche, Count of Gatinais, was youngest son of Fulcois, Count of Mortagne (Perche), of the Chateaudun viscount family, & his wife Melisende. Reconstructed lineage per the Henry Project / Geni; moderate confidence.

Gertrude of Flanders

families.note: Thierry (Diederik) of Alsace, Count of Flanders, was son of Theodoric II, Duke of Lorraine, & Gertrude of Flanders (d.1117, daughter of Robert I 'the Frisian' of Flanders). NOTE: this Gertrude of Flanders (d.1117) is a DIFFERENT person from R2F_GERTRUDE_FLANDERS (d.1186) in 41_grandparents_d3.json, who is Thierry's own daughter — kept distinct. Theodoric II is also linked below as a son of Gerard of Lorraine, making him full brother of batch member Beatrice of Lorraine. Wikipedia.

Gerard I

families.note: Beatrice of Lorraine (Countess of Burgundy, wife of Stephen I) was daughter of Gerard 'the Great', Duke of Lorraine (Gerard of Alsace; the 'Gerard IV' of her label), & Hedwige of Namur. Her full brother Theodoric II, Duke of Lorraine (R3C_THEODORIC2_LORRAINE) is the father of batch member Thierry of Alsace — linking the two Lorraine branches. Full brother Gerard I, Count of Vaudemont, added. Wikipedia 'Beatrice of Lorraine, Countess of Burgundy'.

Alys of France (Countess of the Vexin, betrothed to Richard the Lionheart) was daughter of Louis VII of France (existing LOUISVII) & his 2nd wife Constance of Castile (existing R2E_CONSTANCE_CASTILE, from batch d2). Wikipedia 'Alys, Countess of the Vexin'.
